mapper.select:
SELECT GROUP_ID, GROUP_NAME, REMARK, HOMEPAGE_YN FROM CMS_CODE_GROUP WHERE
(HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND GROUP_ID = #{group_id})
(HOMEPAGE_ID = 'CMS' AND GROUP_ID = #{group_id})
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_CODE_GROUP SET GROUP_NAME = #{group_name}, HOMEPAGE_YN = #{homepage_yn}, REMARK = #{remark}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE, MODIFY_ID = #{cud_id} WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND GROUP_ID = #{group_id}
mapper.delete: DELETE CMS_CODE_GROUP WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND GROUP_ID = #{group_id}
mapper.select: SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, GROUP_ID, CODE_ID, CODE_NAME, USE_YN, REMARK, PRINT_SEQ FROM CMS_CODE WHERE (HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND GROUP_ID = #{group_id}) OR (HOMEPAGE_ID = 'CMS' AND GROUP_ID = #{group_id}) ORDER BY PRINT_SEQ

select.if: SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, '00000' AS GROUP_ID, HOMEPAGE_ID AS CODE_ID, HOMEPAGE_NAME AS CODE_NAME, 'Y' AS USE_YN, REMARK AS REMARK, 0 AS PRINT_SEQ FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_TYPE != 0 ORDER BY HOMEPAGE_TYPE ASC, HOMEPAGE_NAME ASC

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, GROUP_ID, CODE_ID, CODE_NAME, USE_YN, REMARK, PRINT_SEQ FROM CMS_CODE WHERE ( (HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND GROUP_ID = #{group_id}) OR (HOMEPAGE_ID = 'CMS' AND GROUP_ID = #{group_id}) ) AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY PRINT_SEQ

mapper.select:
SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, GROUP_ID, CODE_ID, CODE_NAME, USE_YN, REMARK, PRINT_SEQ FROM CMS_CODE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND CODE_ID = #{code_id}
AND group_id = #{group_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_CODE SET CODE_NAME = #{code_name}, USE_YN = #{use_yn}, REMARK = #{remark}, PRINT_SEQ = #{print_seq}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE, MODIFY_ID = #{cud_id} WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND group_id = #{group_id} AND CODE_ID = #{code_id}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(PRINT_SEQ), 0) + 10 FROM CMS_CODE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND GROUP_ID = #{group_id}
